'''sagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irreformably|irreformably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irreformably|irreformably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:sagate|sagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sagatesher|sagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sagatesherĂ«m|sagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sagatero|sagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sagateshĂ«|sagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sagateshĂ«m|sagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisagatero|gokisagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisagateshĂ«|gokisagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisagateshĂ«m|gokisagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosagankerom|gosagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosagankeshĂ«|gosagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosagankeshĂ«m|gosagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosagankeya|gosagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sagaterom|sagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sagatemu|sagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sagateya|sagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisagaterom|gokisagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisagatemu|gokisagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisagateya|gokisagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:sagagate|sagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sagagatesher|sagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sagagatesherĂ«m|sagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sagagatero|sagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sagagateshĂ«|sagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sagagateshĂ«m|sagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisagagatero|gokisagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisagagateshĂ«|gokisagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisagagateshĂ«m|gokisagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosagagankerom|gosagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosagagankeshĂ«|gosagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosagagankeshĂ«m|gosagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosagagankeya|gosagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sagagaterom|sagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sagagatemu|sagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sagagateya|sagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisagagaterom|gokisagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisagagatemu|gokisagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisagagateya|gokisagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠte|sĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠtesher|sĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠtero|sĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠgĂŠtero|gokisĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gosĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠterom|sĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠtemu|sĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠgĂŠteya|sĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠgĂŠterom|gokisĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠgĂŠteya|gokisĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:safgafte|safgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:safgaftesher|safgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safgaftesherĂ«m|safgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safgaftero|safgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:safgafteshĂ«|safgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safgafteshĂ«m|safgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafgaftero|gokisafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisafgafteshĂ«|gokisafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafgafteshĂ«m|gokisafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosafgafnkerom|gosafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosafgafnkeshĂ«|gosafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosafgafnkeshĂ«m|gosafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosafgafnkeya|gosafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:safgafterom|safgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:safgaftemu|safgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:safgafteya|safgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisafgafterom|gokisafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisafgaftemu|gokisafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisafgafteya|gokisafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
